changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO subjects(name, course, department_id) VALUES ('Algorithmization and Programming', 1, 1), ('Introduction to the Field', 1, 1), ('Fundamentals of Metrology and Standardization', 1, 1), ('Higher Mathematics', 1, 1), ('Engineering and Computer Graphics', 1, 1), ('Physics', 1, 1), ('Philosophy', 1, 1), ('Ukrainian Language for Professional Purposes', 1, 1),
